title: Option Bind Pipeline
code:
let safe_divide x = function
  | 0.0 -> None
  | y -> Some (x /. y)

let safe_head = function
  | [] -> None
  | x :: _ -> Some x

let compute xs divisor =
  safe_head xs
  |> Option.bind (fun first -> safe_divide first 2.0)
  |> Option.bind (fun half -> safe_divide half divisor)

let () = Printf.printf "%s\n" (match compute [10.0; 20.0] 3.0 with Some v -> string_of_float v | None -> "none")
description: Chains partial functions using `Option.bind` and the pipe operator `|>`. Each step can return `None` to short-circuit the pipeline. Equivalent to Haskell's `Maybe` monad but using OCaml's standard library.
